event: Modernist scene of figures in a tropical setting (Judgment of Paris reinterpreted)
description: A modernist pastel or painting depicting a scene with several figures in a tropical setting with palm trees. On the left, two women stand in minimal clothing. On the right, two men in blue sailor-like attire look toward the women. A building or structure is visible in the background. The style is Cubist-influenced with bold outlines, flattened forms, and vibrant pastel colors — greens, blues, oranges, and earth tones. The composition references the classical Judgment of Paris theme reinterpreted in a modern colonial or tropical context.
